summary: Archive game inning markers - Hide Spoilers OFF
description: GIVEN a user has Hide Spoilers OFF

steps.action: WHEN a user watches the archive game from the beginning
steps.result:
THEN inning markers are displayed in the scrubber
AND an up arrow indicates the beginning of the top of the inning
AND a down arrow indicates the beginning of the bottom of the inning
AND a number indicates the inning
